reviews.review_description: This game is way too expensive for the level of polish it offers. The scaling and dimensions are completely broken, making it impossible to stay within the Guardian boundary—I keep getting pushed out of the play area every time I try to do anything. It feels like an unfinished, buggy beta test. Not worth the price tag at all until they fix these basic technical issues. Save your money
I love how slay the bots are

Devs, this is great game, very realistic, well made, and enjoyable, but in the past 2 days, problem arises when you are at the nail salon area and when you place the left leg into the foot bath, it does not stay, but pops right back out of the water and that ruins the experience. The right foot can be placed in the water, but left foot will not stay in the water of foot bath. Please fix this! It worked fine a few days ago.

developer_response.body: Thanks for reporting this! I’ll look into it and fix it!

H

Beauty Salon Simulator VR is a surprisingly fun and well-executed makeover experience—even for someone like me who knows nothing about beauty products or parlors. Within minutes, you can transform a client with a new haircut, color, lenses, eyelashes, nails, and more, finishing with a stylish photo shoot.

It’s rewarding to see the transformation unfold, and chasing the perfect score adds replayability—practice really does make perfect here.

While it naturally appeals to those already interested in makeup and beauty, it’s also a great entry point for anyone curious to learn the lingo and try their hand at the craft. Fun, creative, and polished—worth a try.
Its so fun to play
This game is so fun i love it it is a really really good hobby game

This is such a fun and relaxing  it played it for a couple of hours  but I have a few suggestions that would make it even better. More variety of outfits and prettier expressions for the photo shoot would be great. The expressions look unnatural and silly. It could definitely use some more dialogue with them customers too.The color wheel seems to be inaccurate too. I put it on pure black ( the very edge of the wheel) for the lashes and in always comes out a dark brown.  It can use a little fine tuning and tweaking but for the low price its a very cute game. Is  a  great game for younger players and for people who want a relaxing game to express their creativity.
Awesome game ! Daughter loves it !

I love this game! There’s a few things that hasn’t been working for me though. If I try to color the long hairstyle with the bangs I can’t get the very bottom colored. When I color eyelashes in black the bottom colors correctly but the top will be brown (not even darkbrown, it would be a lighter shade).     Also I am not able to file any of the press on nails! Other than those issues I am having so much fun playing! Oh! Just a suggestion…I think it would be so cool if you added more curly hairstyles (also an Afro of some sort)! Thanks for this awesome game :)

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your feedback, please join my discord to stay tuned with new updates and patches :) https://discord.com/invite/Zdf5zRXbnh

reviews.review_title: Great potential, but I have suggestions
reviews.review_description:
All in all, a game with a lot of addictive potential. I'm already positively surprised, but would still have a few wishes for it to have 5 stars for me:

- More things to unlock. I think you unlocked the few things quickly. Maybe it would have been cooler if you had to work your way up to the nail station, for example, to expand and improve your studio. Or you can buy things for the studio on the PC, like changing the look, other activities like plucking eyebrows or something. I like unlocking things and having a goal, otherwise I lose the desire to do the same things over and over again without making progress or unlocking an achievement.

- when you teleport and try to change your position, it's super easy to accidentally change colour when dyeing your hair. It would be nice to have another solution here or at least to be able to select the previously used colour again. Same happens pushing the controller stick to make the colour palette visible or not.. I accidentally change the chosen colour. Also, I can only really see the selected colour in action, a preview would be nicer.

- Customer feedback would be good. Or some help to show me whether I've done everything right... have I forgotten a section of hair or something? A list is shown, but it doesn't tick itself off. I get coins, but I can't work out what they mean? What is the maximum number you can get? Was it top or was she not happy with something? It would be nice if the list would change so that you can see: All right, here the customer is happy, the quest point is now green or there's a star or something, so I know, full marks for this.

- More discerning customers: you can still do what you want. It would be nice if it were even more difficult, e.g. different hair colour, but no red. Or: different hair colour, but with only cool shades. Etc. 

After all, it's still in early access, so a lot can still happen. I will definitely keep an eye on the game and hope the developers listen to the suggestions. 

PS: I wanted to rate ingame, because you get coins there, but nothing happened after clicking. But not so bad, I have more to play for free.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your positive and constructive feedback! many of the points you mentioned are on our roadmap already! :) Please consider joining my discord to stay posted with new updates and to share any additional feedback you might have in the future. https://discord.com/invite/Zdf5zRXbnh
